changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE gdpr_system_status ( id serial, organization_id integer NOT NULL, system_id integer NOT NULL, compliance double precision, compliance_metric double precision DEFAULT NULL, files_number double precision DEFAULT NULL, articles_processed double precision DEFAULT NULL, articles_number double precision DEFAULT NULL, comments text, CONSTRAINT pk_gdpr_system_status PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_system_status_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_system_status_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_status_to_system ON gdpr_system_status (system_id); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_status_to_organization ON gdpr_system_status (organization_id);
